subject: WM-0165 review: changes_requested
body: High: at the required 1424x861 default viewport all four resource projection points are covered by player-top-bar; real page.mouse clicks on 8:1, 10:1, 12:1 and 14:1 leave resident 0:1 selected, while web-shell.e2e.test.ts:597 tests only resident selection. Make authoritative resource quantities reachable/visible and add real resident+resource mouse evidence. Medium: playable-worker-projection.ts:400-413 replaces an unavailable selected id with the first resident instead of clearing it; add rapid/unavailable identity coverage. Medium: product-gate-harness.test.ts:51-68 is a bypassable exact-string scan limited to shell-bootstrap; smoke-read-model aliases or direct session APIs can restore fixture/time authority without failing it. Strengthen the default-route source guard.
